attributes.title: Incident Observability Overview
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Incident Observability Overview","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# Telco Incident Observability

This starter dashboard is based on structured logs emitted by the backend.

Recommended quick filters:
- `eventDataset : "incident"`
- `eventAction : "close"`
- `incidentStatus : "CLOSED"`
- `priority : "CRITICAL"`
- `noteProvided : true`

Useful fields in Discover:
- `incidentNumber`
- `eventAction`
- `incidentStatus`
- `priority`
- `region`
- `requestId`
- `path`
- `status`","openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}
attributes.description: Starter overview for incident structured logs

attributes.title: Incident KQL Cheatsheet
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Incident KQL Cheatsheet","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"## Starter KQL queries

Open incidents:

```text
eventDataset : "incident" and incidentStatus : "OPEN"
```

Closed critical incidents:

```text
eventDataset : "incident" and eventAction : "close" and priority : "CRITICAL"
```

Events for one incident:

```text
incidentNumber : "INC-103"
```

HTTP errors for incident API:

```text
path : "/api/incidents" and status >= 400
```

Events with action note:

```text
eventDataset : "incident" and noteProvided : true
```","openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Telco Incident Observability
attributes.description: Starter Kibana dashboard for incident lifecycle and request log exploration.
